rect.style: fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0; stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0;

text.style: font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: rgb(42, 63, 95); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre; opacity: 1;

rect.style: stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: none; stroke-width: 0;

text.style: opacity: 1; font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; fill: rgb(42, 63, 95); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(128, 128, 128); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); fill-opacity: 1;

text.style: font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: rgb(128, 128, 128); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;
text.tspan: HOW TO READ: All axes aligned so Higher = Better.
For metrics like Inflation, 0% is at the Top.
